page.title: Needs
page.detailDescription: A dedicated public detail page for {{needId}} is reserved in the new shared UI architecture.

browse.title: Discover active needs
browse.subtitle: Search by text, refine with tri-state filters, and rank results from the best available location context.
browse.sortDescription: Current ranking mixes closeness (50%), ease of setup (30%), and sooner expiry (20%).
browse.searchPlaceholder: Try creator name, title, tooling, or competence
browse.locationFallbackStatus: Using account or Tournai fallback when no explicit coordinates are provided.
browse.locationBrowserStatus: Browser coordinates are available as a fallback when account coordinates are unavailable.
browse.empty: No active needs match the current filters right now.

form.campaignHelper: Only approved and active campaigns are listed
form.expiresAtHelper: Leave empty to keep the need permanent.
form.subtitleCreate: Create a standalone need or link it to an approved, currently active campaign.
form.subtitleEdit: Update your need details and availability settings.
form.notFound: This need was not found or is no longer accessible.

manage.title: Needs workspace
manage.subtitle: Your needs are shown with the most recently modified items first.
manage.empty: You have not created any needs yet.

deleteDialog.title: Delete need?
deleteDialog.body: This will archive "{{title}}" from active listings.

claimDialog.claimingHintSuffix: Add an optional note so the creator knows how you can help.
claimDialog.placeholder: Describe what you can do, when you are available, or anything the creator should know.

claimConversation.notFound: This claim could not be loaded.
claimConversation.title: Conversation for {{needTitle}}
claimConversation.sendFirstReply: Send the first reply to open the private conversation.
claimConversation.creatorNotReplied: The creator has not replied yet. You will be able to continue once the conversation is started.
claimConversation.settledInfo: This claim is settled. The conversation stays open for follow-up coordination between the two participants.
claimConversation.firstReplyPlaceholder: Write the first message that will open the conversation
claimConversation.imageHelper: Optional image URLs, separated by commas or new lines.

claimNotifications.empty: No claim activity yet. Once you claim a need or receive one on your own need, it will appear here.
claimNotifications.title: Claim activity
claimNotifications.subtitle: Track your own claims, incoming requests on your needs, and open the related conversation threads.

claimManagement.notAvailable: This claim is no longer available.
claimManagement.title: Manage claim
claimManagement.settleInfo: Settling this claim confirms the selected helper and automatically declines the remaining open claims for the same need.
claimManagement.topesAttached: {{amount}} Topes are attached to this need.
claimManagement.noTopesAttached: No Topes amount is attached to this need.
